# C89
**The Octahedral Gap: the tetrahedra's intersection (volume 1/6 of the cube) is the geometric locus of the conditional-independence bound; the gap is β is the octahedron, three readings of one thing**

*Confidence:* ~30% · *Status:* active · registered Run 5, 2026-06-10 · volume facts are theorems, the correspondence is the conjecture · *Register:* core
*Home:* privacy_value_v6_draft.md Part V §V.4

Band VIII · Registered during the V6 runs
